title: Samareia #4540
definition:
Samaria = "guardianship"

 1) a territory in Palestine, which had Samaria as its capital
nasbUsage:
Definition: Samaria = "guardianship"

 1) a territory in Palestine, which had Samaria as its capital

    NASB:  Samaria, the name of both a city and a region in Pal.:
